title: carduus carlinifolius subsp. paui
intro: Carduus carlinifolius subsp. paui is a plant species in the dandelion family, known for its prickly leaves and yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the Iberian Peninsula, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory properties, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits associated with Carduus carlinifolius subsp. paui include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various uses in traditional medicine and home remedies.
